hero.intro: I build reliable backend systems and full-stack web apps with C# and ASP.NET Core — from production APIs to the databases and interfaces around them.

about.title: About
about.p1: I'm a backend developer based in Moncton, New Brunswick, and a recent graduate of NBCC Moncton. I focus on the C# / .NET ecosystem — ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework Core, and relational databases like SQL Server and PostgreSQL.
about.p2: During my practicum at Gravitit I shipped a production application end to end: Flight Plan, a tool pilots use to file official ICAO flight plans online and download print-ready PDFs. I care about clean, maintainable code, sensible architecture, and getting work into users' hands.
about.architecture: I've deliberately built across three architectural styles — Clean Architecture, Layered / N-Tier, and Vertical Slice — so I understand the trade-offs each one makes instead of reaching for the same pattern every time.
about.availability: I'm open to backend and full-stack roles — on-site in Moncton or remote across Canada.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of things I've designed, built, and shipped.

flightPlan.summary: A web app that digitizes the official ICAO flight plan: pilots fill out a form online and download a print-ready PDF. Built during my practicum at Gravitit.

nbTcgTrader.summary: A localized trading-card marketplace and digital collection organizer. Its core feature turns a bulk CSV/Excel import into a visual digital "binder", from which a user can list cards for sale and connect with local buyers. The data model is TCG-agnostic (Pokémon first).

recipeWorld.summary: A full-stack recipe platform where users share and review recipes, with role-based admin approval workflows for new ingredients and categories.

smartRetail.summary: An end-to-end IoT inventory tracker: an ESP32 sensor measures shelf stock and posts it to an ASP.NET Core API that a live dashboard reads from.

collaborations.title: Collaborations
collaborations.subtitle: Side projects built together with Brian Cabello.

flavorDaCasa.summary: A restaurant management system built with Java and Spring Boot, following Clean Architecture.

triviaQuest.summary: A real-time multiplayer trivia game built with Node.js, Express, and Socket.io.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: The tools I reach for, grouped by where they fit.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Have a role, a project, or a question? The fastest way to reach me is email — I'm always happy to talk.

footer.built: Built with React, Vite & Tailwind CSS
